//: Scopes this directory to CommonJS. core/package.json sets "type": "module", which would otherwise make Node and esbuild read these .js files as ES modules and break their module.exports. These files must stay CommonJS because the Hosted edition loads them through PocketBase's goja require(), which has no ES module support. Consumers are unaffected: pb_hooks uses require(`${__hooks}/shared/x.js`), core TS uses import ... from "../shared/x.js".
